Simple pricing for serious traders

Start free with three signals a day. Go Pro for unlimited conviction, or Elite for prediction-market intelligence and AI briefings.

Free
$0/mo

Get a feel for the signal.

  • 3 signals per day
  • LONG / SHORT / WAIT calls
  • Confidence & probability split
  • 8-asset core watchlist
Start free
Most popular
Pro
$49/mo

For the serious independent trader.

  • Unlimited signals
  • Full factor breakdown
  • Custom watchlists & alerts
  • Entry & invalidation zones
  • Email + push notifications
Choose Pro
Elite
$199/mo

Institutional-grade intelligence.

  • Everything in Pro
  • Advanced performance analytics
  • Prediction-market intelligence (Kalshi + Polymarket)
  • Priority SMS / Telegram / Discord alerts
  • AI market briefings & signal videos
Choose Elite

Questions, answered

Is Apex Signal financial advice?

No. Apex Signal is an educational probability tool. Signals are statistical estimates, not recommendations — you are responsible for your own trades.

What markets are covered?

Stocks, ETFs, and crypto out of the box, plus prediction markets (Kalshi, Polymarket). You can add any custom ticker to your watchlist.

How often do signals update?

The core universe is re-scanned every 15 minutes and your watchlist every 5 minutes. Elite alerts fire the instant conviction crosses your threshold.

Can I cancel anytime?

Yes. Plans are month-to-month with no lock-in. Downgrade to Free whenever you like.

Apex Signal is an educational probability tool, not financial advice. Signals are statistical estimates, not recommendations. You are solely responsible for your own trading decisions and any resulting gains or losses.
